name: Security Operations Center
description: A 24/7 cybersecurity nerve center staffed by analysts monitoring national networks for intrusions, anomalies, and attacks. Coordinates incident response and threat hunting across government and critical infrastructure.

specialAbilities.name: Rapid Incident Response
specialAbilities.description: Dedicated response teams contain and remediate breaches within hours, minimizing damage from successful intrusions.

specialAbilities.name: Proactive Threat Hunting
specialAbilities.description: Analysts actively search for hidden adversaries in networks rather than waiting for alerts, discovering stealthy APTs.
